report.summary: Production stable — 15+ successful redeploys today, all API routes healthy with caching, 2 TS error files flagged, Vercel trial expiring in 8 days needs attention.

sections.title: QA Sweep
items: Published pages audit: 399 slugs in published-pages.ts, 295 have page.tsx files, 104 are placeholder slugs awaiting page creation (known backlog)

TypeScript errors: 42 errors across 2 files — src/app/learn/crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx (JSX syntax) and src/lib/structured-data.examples.ts (template syntax). Non-blocking due to ignoreBuildErrors:true but should be fixed
Local build: OOM (Bus error) in VM environment — Vercel builds succeeding at ~4min, so not a production concern
Last git commit (cb65a9d): 'publish: promote 5 pages to production (Day 42)' — 23h ago. Two earlier error deploys (538e7e4, e36d391) were fixed in subsequent commits
No new regressions detected since last cycle

sections.title: Data Pipeline Health
items: All 6 public API routes present: prices (CoinGecko, 60s TTL), trending (CoinGecko, 5min TTL), fear-greed (Alternative.me, 10min TTL), market-dominance (CoinGecko, 5min TTL), market-metrics (CoinGecko+Alternative.me, 60s TTL), defi-yields (DefiLlama, 5min TTL)
Fallback data: 5 of 6 routes have fallback — defi-yields returns 500 on failure (no fallback, flagged for fix)
Rate limiting: None of the 6 public API routes have rate limiting applied — risk of abuse on high-traffic routes like /api/prices
Cache headers: All routes set proper Cache-Control with stale-while-revalidate. Data freshness ladder intact

sections.title: DevOps & Deployment
items: Current production: deployment 8669UtKE9 — Status: Ready, build time 4m 23s (redeploy of 4uAwEAv, 37min ago)
Deployment cadence: 15+ successful redeploys in last 24h, all ~4min build times, zero failures in recent chain
Last git-triggered deploy: cb65a9d (Day 42 publish) — built successfully at 2m 50s
ALERT: Vercel Pro trial expires in 8 days — payment method must be added to avoid service interruption
Vercel platform status: All systems normal

sections.title: PM Wrap-Up
items: Shipped this cycle: Day 42 publish (5 pages promoted to production), WhaleWatchClient component fix, 4 client/server page splits for metadata conflicts

Carry-over for next cycle: Fix 2 TS error files (crypto-index-funds-guide, structured-data.examples), add fallback data to defi-yields route, add rate limiting to public API routes, address 104 missing page.tsx files in backlog
BLOCKER: Vercel trial expiring in 8 days — Jefe needs to add payment method at vercel.com before Mar 25 to avoid downtime
